calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing For Request For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Nation Discounts LLC and Defendant Kerisha Nell Brown.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 10:47:09 and concluding at 10:58:27 a.m. (D505).

Catherine Robertson, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff REV Capital (California) Inc.
Defendant Nation Discounts LLC and Defendant Kerisha Nell Brown not appearing.
Fahad Ali, witness, sworn to testify for the plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract filed Jan-26-2024.
Proof of personal service served as to Defendant on Mar-07-2024.
Default entered as to Defendant Nation Discounts LLC and Defendant Kerisha Nell Brown.
on Mar-07-2024.
Motion for prove up hearing filed May-14-2024.

Counsel to provide a summary, offer of proof of the prayer in the complaint.
Counsel discusses and offers proof of the factoring fees.
Witness testifies to the notes on the invoice.
The invoices are discussed between court and counsel.
The court is inclined to deny the request for fees in the amount of $77,000.00
The court inquires if plaintiff need more time to provide evidence/ information on the final invoicing to the defendant, early termination fees, factoring fees and late fees. The court needs to determine if the $77,000.00 request is reasonable.
Plaintiff to proceed with principal and costs.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:
Damages $154,962.17
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $16,410.03
Costs $878.38
Total Judgment $172,250.58

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2024 Continued To Oct-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
